footer.disclaimer: Dietary supplements are not medicines. They are not intended to prevent or treat diseases.
footer.expertNote: All products are selected by our expert consultants.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Bringing the power of nature together with science
about.story: Hüda-i Şifa was founded to offer natural and supplement products with expert consultation. Our goal is to deliver the right products from the most reliable sources on your healthy living journey.
about.missionText: To ensure everyone can easily access science-based, natural, and reliable supplement products suited to their needs.
about.visionText: To make healthy living accessible for everyone as Turkey's most trusted natural product platform.
about.value1Text: All our products are expert-approved and made from tested ingredients.
about.value2Text: We use the best raw materials that nature has to offer.
about.value3Text: We openly share ingredient information and expert notes.

experts.title: Our Experts
experts.subtitle: Our products are selected and recommended by field experts
experts.expert1Bio: Specialized in dietary supplements and functional nutrition with 15 years of experience.
experts.expert2Bio: Over 10 years of experience in herbal products and natural supplements.
experts.expert3Bio: Working in clinical nutrition and dietary supplement consulting.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach out to us with your questions
contact.successMessage: Your message has been received. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.successBody: We'll get back to you within 1 business day.

products.wishlistEmptyHint: Click the heart icon to save products you like.
products.reviewSubmitSuccess: Your review has been submitted for moderation.
products.reviewSubmitHint: It will appear here once approved.
products.reviewBodyPlaceholder: Share your experience with this product...
products.desc_vitaminD3K2Desc: High-dose D3 and K2 combination for bone health and immunity.
products.expert_vitaminD3K2Expert: Vitamin D deficiency is very common. K2 combination supports proper calcium utilization.
products.ing_vitaminD3K2Ingredients: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) 2000 IU, Vitamin K2 (Menaquinone-7) 75 mcg, Olive oil, Gelatin capsule.
products.desc_omega3Desc: High EPA and DHA content supports heart, brain and joint health.
products.expert_omega3Expert: EPA+DHA ratio is critical in quality fish oil. This formula contains clinical dose EPA.
products.ing_omega3Ingredients: Fish oil concentrate (EPA 360mg, DHA 240mg), Vitamin E (antioxidant), Gelatin capsule.
products.desc_magnesiumDesc: Best absorbed magnesium form. For sleep quality, muscles and nervous system.
products.expert_magnesiumExpert: Bisglycinate form causes no stomach issues and has the highest absorption rate.
products.desc_probioticDesc: 12 different probiotic strains, powerful formula for digestion and immunity.
products.expert_probioticExpert: Probiotics with diverse strains increase gut flora diversity.
products.ing_probioticIngredients: Lactobacillus acidophilus, L. rhamnosus, Bifidobacterium longum and 9 other strains (50 billion CFU total), prebiotic FOS.
products.use_probioticUsage: Take 1 capsule daily, 30 minutes before breakfast with water.
products.desc_vitaminCDesc: Buffered vitamin C formula for immunity and skin health.
products.ing_vitaminCIngredients: Ascorbic acid 1000mg, Calcium ascorbate, Rose hip extract.
products.desc_vitaminB12Desc: Active B12 form methylcobalamin for energy and nervous system.
products.expert_vitaminB12Expert: Methylcobalamin form is directly usable by the body, unlike cyanocobalamin.
products.use_vitaminB12Usage: Dissolve 1 tablet under the tongue daily.
products.desc_rawHoneyDesc: Unprocessed, unfiltered. All enzymes and nutritional values preserved.
products.use_rawHoneyUsage: 1-2 teaspoons daily, preferably on an empty stomach in the morning.
products.desc_chiaSeedDesc: Superfood rich in Omega-3, fiber and protein.
products.use_chiaSeedUsage: Add 1-2 tablespoons to water, yogurt or smoothie daily.
products.desc_turmericDesc: Rich in curcumin, for antioxidant support and joint health.
products.use_turmericUsage: Half teaspoon daily with black pepper, added to meals or hot drinks.
products.desc_arganOilDesc: Cold-pressed, 100% pure. For skin and hair care.
products.expert_arganOilExpert: Cold-pressed argan oil is rich in vitamin E and oleic acid.
products.ing_arganOilIngredients: 100% pure argan oil (Argania spinosa kernel oil). Cold-pressed.
products.use_arganOilUsage: Apply 3-5 drops to face. Apply small amount to hair ends.
products.desc_collagenSerumDesc: Anti-aging serum with marine collagen and hyaluronic acid.
products.ing_collagenSerumIngredients: Marine collagen peptides, Hyaluronic acid, Vitamin C, Niacinamide, Water.
products.use_collagenSerumUsage: Apply a few drops to cleansed skin morning and evening.
products.desc_gutHealthPackDesc: Triple combination of Probiotic + Prebiotic + Digestive Enzyme.
products.expert_gutHealthPackExpert: This triple combination provides the most comprehensive support for gut health.
products.ing_gutHealthPackIngredients: Probiotic 50 Billion CFU, Prebiotic Inulin 5g, Digestive Enzyme Complex.
products.use_gutHealthPackUsage: Take each product according to its own usage instructions. Details inside package.
products.desc_creatineDesc: Pure creatine monohydrate formula for muscle strength and performance.
products.expert_creatineExpert: Creatine is the most scientifically proven sports supplement.
products.use_creatineUsage: Mix 1 scoop (3g) with water and take before or after training daily.
products.desc_bcaaDesc: Leucine, isoleucine and valine combination for muscle protection and recovery.
products.expert_bcaaExpert: BCAAs prevent muscle breakdown during training and accelerate recovery.
products.use_bcaaUsage: Take 1 serving per day, mix with water during or after training.
products.expert_wheyProteinExpert: Quality whey protein should contain all essential amino acids and minimal additives.
products.ing_wheyProteinIngredients: Whey Protein Concentrate 80%, Natural vanilla flavor.
products.use_wheyProteinUsage: Take 1-2 servings (30g) daily, mix with water or milk after training.
products.desc_glutamineDesc: The most abundant amino acid for immunity and muscle recovery.
products.use_glutamineUsage: Take 5g daily, mix with water after training or before bed.
products.desc_magnesiumSportDesc: Special formula to support muscle recovery and prevent cramps after intense training.
products.expert_magnesiumSportExpert: Athletes lose more magnesium than sedentary individuals. Combination with B6 enhances absorption.
products.desc_hyaluronicSerumDesc: 3 different molecular weight hyaluronic acid for deep hydration and skin rejuvenation.
products.expert_hyaluronicSerumExpert: Multi-molecular weight HA serums moisturize both surface and deep skin layers.
products.ing_hyaluronicSerumIngredients: Hyaluronic acid (low, medium, high molecular weight), Panthenol, Water.
products.use_hyaluronicSerumUsage: Apply to cleansed skin morning and evening. Seal with moisturizer.
products.desc_collagenPowderDesc: Marine-sourced hydrolyzed collagen. For skin elasticity, joint and bone health.
products.expert_collagenPowderExpert: Collagen supplementation with vitamin C helps the body synthesize its own collagen.
products.ing_collagenPowderIngredients: Hydrolyzed marine collagen peptides 10g, Vitamin C 80mg.
products.use_collagenPowderUsage: Add 1 scoop (10g) to water, juice or smoothie daily.
products.desc_rosehipOilDesc: Rich in vitamins A and C and essential fatty acids. Anti-dark spot and anti-wrinkle.
products.ing_rosehipOilIngredients: 100% pure rosehip seed oil (Rosa canina). Cold-pressed.
products.use_rosehipOilUsage: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin at night and gently massage.
products.desc_biotinDesc: High-dose biotin (vitamin B7) for hair, nail and skin health.
products.expert_biotinExpert: Biotin deficiency can cause hair loss and brittle nails. 5000mcg is considered a clinical dose.
products.use_biotinUsage: Take 1 tablet with breakfast in the morning.
products.desc_vitaminEOilDesc: Antioxidant oil with pure tocopherol. For dry skin and scarring.
products.ing_vitaminEOilIngredients: d-alpha Tocopherol (Vitamin E) 10000 IU, Sunflower oil.
products.use_vitaminEOilUsage: Apply a small amount to skin or nails at night.
products.sportsHeroSubtitle: Boost your performance with natural supplements. Creatine, BCAA, Whey Protein and more.
products.sportsCtaSubtitle: Our expert dietitians and sports nutrition consultants help you choose the right products.
products.beautyHeroSubtitle: Natural beauty from the inside out. Nourish your skin with Hyaluronic Acid, Collagen, Biotin and more.
products.beautyCtaSubtitle: Let our expert team find the most suitable natural beauty products for your skin type.
